title: Cirrus: Remove multi-arch podman image builds
body:
These jobs have been failing since early August due to technical/scripting problems.  Disable/remove entirely since a fix is unlikely to be implemented anytime soon.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19720 - I gave up trying to debug it.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: LGTM. "Failing" and "technical/scripting problem" are not defined. Is any future maintainer likely to wonder (or care) what the failure symptom is, and/or why the problem is insurmountable?

> Is any future maintainer likely to wonder (or care) what the failure symptom is, and/or why the problem is insurmountable?

Hmmm, good point :thinking: The problem is mostly documented in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19720  I spent weeks trying to debug it without much luck.  More than likely I'll be the one worrying about it, and/or dropping my script entirely for a future implementation.   I'll drop mention of it in the PR description on the off-chance it helps someone...
Force-push: included abandoned jq-fix test pr. ref.
